response.global_analysis: Vocal audio matches the identified songs 'Asuiro ClearSky' and 'Shiny Smily Story'. The Reference JSON provided partial lyrics for the first song, which I used for verification, while transcribing the rest from audio. Timestamps are tightly wrapped to the vocal bursts, and the transition from singing to dialogue at 03:34 is accurately captured. On-screen text for song titles and goods was used to ensure correct spelling.

subtitles.original: なまえつけてハート
subtitles.english: Give it a name, Heart

subtitles.original: どれも全部大事って 言えるはず
subtitles.english: I should be able to say everything is important

subtitles.original: みんなのためが力になる
subtitles.english: Being for everyone becomes my strength

subtitles.original: 今日も賑やかすぎるくらい
subtitles.english: Today is also almost too lively

subtitles.original: 笑顔が止まらない
subtitles.english: The smiles won't stop

subtitles.original: 思いは膨らんでいく
subtitles.english: Feelings are expanding

subtitles.original: 重ねて今ギュッと噛み締めた
subtitles.english: Overlapping, now I firmly savored it

subtitles.original: 独り占め時間 カウントダウンは広がる
subtitles.english: Monopolizing time, the countdown expands

subtitles.original: 風を感じたら真っ直ぐに
subtitles.english: If you feel the wind, go straight

subtitles.original: 行くよ 夢見る空へ
subtitles.english: Let's go, to the dreaming sky

subtitles.original: あすいろClearSky
subtitles.english: Asuiro ClearSky

subtitles.original: 背伸びしては手を伸ばす 憧れの
subtitles.english: Standing on tiptoes and reaching out...

subtitles.original: 行き先示す星になろう
subtitles.english: to the yearning, let's be the star showing the way.

subtitles.original: 近づくその度に 手を差し伸べ合えたら
subtitles.english: If we can reach out whenever we get closer,

subtitles.original: すぐに届くはずさ
subtitles.english: it should reach us soon.

subtitles.original: そっと踏み出した 小さな勇気が
subtitles.english: The small courage I softly stepped forward with,

subtitles.original: もう消えないように繋げよう
subtitles.english: let's connect it so it never disappears again.

subtitles.original: 不安も愛しさも大切に抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embracing both anxiety and love dearly,

subtitles.original: 共に行くよ 目を合わせて 3, 2, 1
subtitles.english: we'll go together, eye to eye, 3, 2, 1.

subtitles.original: 晴れ渡る希望へ
subtitles.english: Towards the clear hope,

subtitles.original: 飛び出せるよ 突き抜けていく
subtitles.english: I can jump out, piercing through.

subtitles.original: 僕たちの透き通る決意今
subtitles.english: Our transparent determination, right now.

subtitles.original: まだまだ止められないよ
subtitles.english: It can't be stopped yet.

subtitles.original: ありきたりな日常こそ ときめきに変えて もっと
subtitles.english: Turn even mundane daily life into excitement, more.

subtitles.original: 僕たちがいつまでも
subtitles.english: Because we will,

subtitles.original: 背中を押すから
subtitles.english: always be pushing your back.

subtitles.original: 憧れの舞台立ちたい
subtitles.english: I want to stand on the stage of my dreams.

subtitles.original: らしく輝きたい
subtitles.english: I want to shine like myself.

subtitles.original: 時に涙して また笑い合いたい
subtitles.english: Sometimes crying, wanting to laugh together again.

subtitles.original: 同じ未来を見たい
subtitles.english: I want to see the same future.

subtitles.original: あの夢手にしたい
subtitles.english: I want to hold that dream.

subtitles.original: 踏み出そう 奇跡の一歩を
subtitles.english: Let's take it, the first step of a miracle.

subtitles.original: 生き切らして夢追いかけたい
subtitles.english: I want to chase dreams until I'm out of breath.

subtitles.original: ワクワク止まらない
subtitles.english: The excitement won't stop.

subtitles.original: ゾクゾク超えていく 世界に見せてあげる
subtitles.english: Going beyond the shivers, I'll show the world.

subtitles.original: アクセスしてみたい
subtitles.english: I want to try accessing.

subtitles.original: 後悔なんてここにない
subtitles.english: There's no regret here.

subtitles.original: それぞれ違った心で 作るわ
subtitles.english: We'll make it with our different hearts.

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、ホロライブ... ホロライブメドレー、自分んの事務所なのに、でした！
subtitles.english: So, that was the hololive... hololive medley, even though it's my own agency!

subtitles.original: いやどうだった？なんか激エモだったんじゃないですか？
subtitles.english: How was it? It was super emotional, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: そしてね、この衣装は初めて貰ったアイドル衣装なんでございますよね
subtitles.english: And you know, this costume is the first idol costume I ever received.

subtitles.original: なんかあの時を思い出して、なんかすごいジーンときてしまいますわね
subtitles.english: Remembering that time, it really tugs at the heartstrings.

subtitles.original: そう、まつりはね、元々そのアイドルデビューじゃなかったんですよホロライブって
subtitles.english: Right, Matsuri didn't actually start as an idol in hololive.

subtitles.original: でこの衣装貰って、よしアイドルとして頑張るぞというね、気持ちを改めて思い出し
subtitles.english: Receiving this costume reminded me of that feeling of 'I'll do my best as an idol'.

subtitles.original: 頑張っていこうかなという気持ちでございます
subtitles.english: And I feel motivated to keep giving it my all.

subtitles.original: はい、そしてそして、今回も！
subtitles.english: Yes, and and, this time too!

subtitles.original: 誕生日グッズでございまーす！やったー！
subtitles.english: It's birthday goods! Yay!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい、ということで、一つずつ紹介していきます
subtitles.english: I'm so happy, so I'll introduce them one by one.

subtitles.original: まずは、こちら！ドドン！
subtitles.english: First, here it is! Ta-da!

subtitles.original: 「薄すぎっ！おっぱいマウスパッド」
subtitles.english: "Too Thin! Oppai Mouse Pad"

subtitles.original: あ、おっぱいマウスパッド！やったー！
subtitles.english: Ah, an oppai mouse pad! Yay!

subtitles.original: イラストは、えく先生！
subtitles.english: Illustrated by Eku-sensei!

subtitles.original: まつり待望のね、マウスパッドでございますよ
subtitles.english: It's the mouse pad Matsuri has been waiting for.

subtitles.original: もう、あのちなみに言うと、膨らみは、ないです
subtitles.english: By the way, there is no bulge.

subtitles.original: 普通のマウスパッドとなっております
subtitles.english: It's a regular mouse pad.
